## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between HockeyStack and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, review blog posts, and analyze performance metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/4Wt47zS3yBdysnPXKsM6kM2-hUUvnzHV?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [3 blogs ready for review; aiming for 5 next week (3 new, 2 refreshes)](https://fathom.video/share/4Wt47zS3yBdysnPXKsM6kM2-hUUvnzHV?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Enterprise angle to be emphasized in CaliberMind vs HockeyStack comparison](https://fathom.video/share/4Wt47zS3yBdysnPXKsM6kM2-hUUvnzHV?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)
  - [New keyword research completed; 20 new blog ideas generated](https://fathom.video/share/4Wt47zS3yBdysnPXKsM6kM2-hUUvnzHV?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)
  - [Looker dashboard set up with GSC and GA4 data for performance tracking](https://fathom.video/share/4Wt47zS3yBdysnPXKsM6kM2-hUUvnzHV?tab=summary&timestamp=1119.0)

## Topics

### Content Review and Publishing
